subject: Painting bids in 24 hours for Gateway
body:
Hi Wayne,

50 years at Gateway means you've bid a lot of multifamily, institutional, and commercial. Painting subs bidding slow and bloated don't help your numbers — or your bid book.

Lumi (our AI estimating agent) returns a 95%-detailed bid in 24 hours, at least 13% lower than human-estimated subs (we don't carry that overhead). Plus Lumia auto-status during the job and pro cleaning at handoff with no surface damage.

Worth adding us to Gateway's painting bid list?
cta: Worth adding us to Gateway's painting bid list?
